title: Trimble PC*MILER Route Structure
description: Structure documentation for commercial vehicle route entities returned by Trimble PC*MILER routing API

structure.totalMiles: number — Total route distance in miles
structure.totalHours: number — Total estimated drive time in hours
structure.routeType: string enum — Optimization method: Practical | Shortest | Fastest | Tolls | Avoid53
structure.vehicleType: string enum — Vehicle class: Truck | LightTruck | Auto | Motorcycle

vehicleParameters.height: number — Vehicle height in feet (used for clearance restrictions)
vehicleParameters.weight: number — Gross vehicle weight in pounds (used for weight limit compliance)
vehicleParameters.hazmat: string enum — Hazardous materials class: None | General | Explosive | InhalationHazard | Radioactive | Flammable | Corrosive | Oxidizer | Poisonous
vehicleParameters.axles: integer (2-9) — Number of axles for toll classification

stops._description: Ordered list of route stops from origin to destination

_item.stopType: string enum — Stop role: Origin | Waypoint | Destination

legs._description: Individual route segments between consecutive stops

_item.legHours: number — Segment drive time in hours

tolls.totalCost: number — Total toll cost in USD

_item.roadName: string — Toll road or facility name

structure.fuelCost: number — Estimated fuel cost in USD based on average diesel price and MPG

_item.distance: number — Distance to next step in miles
_item.driveTime: string — Drive time in HH:MM format

routeTypeValues.Practical: Balanced route optimizing time and mileage (default for trucks)
routeTypeValues.Shortest: Minimum mileage regardless of road type
routeTypeValues.Fastest: Minimum drive time using higher-speed roads
routeTypeValues.Avoid53: Avoid roads restricted to vehicles over 53 feet

notes: All distances are in statute miles (not kilometers)
totalHours does not include rest stops, fuel stops, or HOS breaks
fuelCost is an estimate based on national average diesel price; not a guaranteed figure
Hazmat routing enforces tunnel and route restrictions per USDOT regulations
Weight-restricted routes are enforced based on posted limits; seasonal restrictions may apply
